scripts.build:desktop:app: npm run build:backend-sidecar && npm --workspace apps/desktop run tauri -- build --bundles app --ci
scripts.build:desktop:win: npm run build:backend-sidecar && npm --workspace apps/desktop run tauri -- build --bundles nsis --ci
scripts.check:rust: npm run build:backend-sidecar && cargo check --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
scripts.test:privacy: cd backend && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python -m unittest tests.test_deidentification_service tests.test_llm_service tests.test_heartbeat_service tests.test_clinician_summary_service tests.test_mcp_gateway -v
